creator: rometravelers
caption:
Every corner here feels like a scene from a story that never ends by @heydavina ✨😍 Send this to your favorite traveler partner! ❤️

💡Rome’s strict building laws preserve its historic skyline, meaning no modern high-rises dominate the view. Instead, you see domes, bell towers, and terracotta rooftops glowing under the sun.

transcription.text: ♪ I'm in a bad girl good mood wearing my gold hoops ♪ ♪ Lining my lips right now in the rear view baby ♪ ♪ Don't even put ♪
